status: PRE-MERGE -- PR open, not merged. This bundle documents the state at the commit SHA below, not a completed lane.

pnpm_type_check.note: scripts/ are not part of tsconfig.json's project-reference build graph (tsc -b only covers packages/apps), so pnpm type-check does not itself type-check scripts/ops/proof-repair.ts or scripts/ci/direct-main-push-guard.ts -- this is pre-existing repo posture (confirmed: no scripts/* file is reachable from tsconfig.json's references), not something this lane introduced. Both new files were additionally verified with a standalone strict tsc pass (--strict --noUncheckedIndexedAccess --exactOptionalPropertyTypes, matching tsconfig.base.json's settings) with zero genuine errors -- see verification.md.

targeted_tests.command: npx tsx --test scripts/ops/proof-repair.test.ts scripts/ci/direct-main-push-guard.test.ts scripts/ops/truth-check-lib.test.ts scripts/ops/lane-close.test.ts
targeted_tests.note: Up from 130: 3 tests added by a Codex review round (total cap / malformed-target-class fixes on the detection guard + repair scaffold) plus 6 runtime tests added for occurrence 3 (5 new guardRepairAgainstMainCheckout/buildRepairRequiredViaPrPacket tests + 1 more remediationForCode('repair_required_via_pr') loop iteration).

full_ops_suite.note: Includes the 138 targeted tests above plus every other scripts/ops + scripts/ci test file in the repo -- confirms no regression from the truth-check-lib.ts / lane-close.ts changes, including the occurrence-3 guardRepairAgainstMainCheckout() addition.

r_level.command: pnpm exec tsx scripts/ci/r-level-check.ts --base origin/main --head HEAD

pnpm_verify.note: Full pnpm verify (env:check, lint, type-check, build, test -- including live-DB-touching suites inside pnpm test such as UTV2-1136/UTV2-1327/UTV2-1459) ran green on this branch prior to the runtime_proof run captured below. See verification.md for the captured summary.

queries.description: database-smoke.test.ts inserts and deletes a real submission row as part of the persist-submission-and-settlement live write-path test
database-smoke.test.ts inserts and deletes a real pick row as part of the persist-submission-and-settlement live write-path test
database-smoke.test.ts selects pick_lifecycle rows to verify no lifecycle event is written on an invalid atomic enqueue (UTV2-920 rollback test)
database-smoke.test.ts selects distribution_outbox rows to verify status/receipt/lifecycle/audit rollback on an invalid atomic delivery confirmation (UTV2-920 rollback test)
database-smoke.test.ts selects distribution_receipts rows as part of the same atomic-delivery rollback verification
database-smoke.test.ts selects audit_log rows to verify no audit row is written on an invalid atomic settlement (UTV2-920 rollback test) and that a re-settlement correction is additive (UTV2-996)
database-smoke.test.ts inserts settlement_records rows to verify a correction chain is additive and the original settlement row is not mutated (UTV2-996)
database-smoke.test.ts verifies no duplicate participants for the same external_id and sport (UTV2-883)

runtime_proof.row_counts_note: Live table row counts queried directly against the zfzdnfwdarxucxtaojxm Supabase project (via the mcp__claude_ai_Supabase__execute_sql tool, a single UNION ALL SELECT COUNT(*) statement across all 6 monitored tables) immediately after the pnpm test:db run above (which cleans up its own inserted rows via explicit deletes -- these counts reflect steady-state live data, not test artifacts). This lane's own diff (governance docs + TypeScript ops/ci tooling) does not itself touch any of these tables; this runtime proof exists because tier === 'T1' makes truth-check-lib.ts's runtime_proof_required gate unconditional, independent of whether the diff's own files touch DB code -- the same fact this incident's own root cause documents about the concurrency ramp lane's proof requirement.

sha_binding.verified_source_note: This branch's implementation commit (the only substantive commit on this branch at the time this proof was authored) -- an ancestor of the PR's head at every point checked.
sha_binding.merge_sha_note: Not merged. This field is intentionally null. Will be populated post-merge via ops:proof-generate --merge-sha by post-merge-lane-close.yml's existing, bot-safe SYNC_BOT_TOKEN mechanism -- the same narrowly-scoped automation this lane's own incident record documents as the one pre-existing, ratified exception to DIRECT_MAIN_BYPASS_POLICY.md.
sha_binding.proof_bundle_base_note: The commit this proof bundle document was authored against (its own parent, i.e. the implementation commit) -- not a claim about the PR's current live head. The PR's actual, live current head is validated externally by GitHub itself and by the SHA-bound executor-result/v1 comment posted after each push.

acceptance_criteria.truthful_incident_record_created: PASS -- docs/06_status/INCIDENTS/INC-2026-07-14-utv2-1533-direct-main-push.md, every fact independently verified via git/gh before writing (see the record's own Detection Path section)
acceptance_criteria.no_invented_pre_authorization: PASS -- the record states plainly that no emergency exception was recorded before the push
acceptance_criteria.root_cause_identified: PASS -- immediate cause (fail-closed gate correctly rejecting missing runtime proof) + 4 contributing causes (no governed repair path, enforce_admins:false verified via gh api, unlogged recurrence of the July 10 precedent, and lane-close.ts's --repair-merged lacking proof-repair.ts's governed-landing contract -- the exact mechanism that produced occurrence 3)
acceptance_criteria.compliant_repair_path_built: PASS -- scripts/ops/proof-repair.ts, additive-only, never writes to main, never fabricates evidence, never overwrites an already-bound merge SHA
acceptance_criteria.merge_sha_preserved_never_overwritten: PASS -- mergeRuntimeProofIntoEvidence never touches sha_binding.merge_sha; apply refuses to proceed if --merge-sha does not match the already-bound value
acceptance_criteria.hand_authored_content_not_clobbered: PASS -- additive top-level merge only sets verifier + runtime_proof; test asserts a hand-authored continuation section survives byte-identical
acceptance_criteria.real_t1_runtime_evidence_required: PASS -- validateRuntimeProofFile fails closed on missing/failing/inconsistent runtime-proof-file input
acceptance_criteria.fails_clearly_not_silently: PASS -- every failure path returns a distinct machine-readable code + human-readable remediation string, never a silent no-op
acceptance_criteria.no_fabricated_evidence_in_repair_path_co: PASS -- proof-repair.ts never runs pnpm test:db itself and never invents SHAs or query/row-count data
acceptance_criteria.no_infinite_workflow_loop: PASS by design -- a repair PR's merge lands real runtime_proof through the normal PR gate, so the next post-merge-lane-close.yml run's truth-check now passes; post-merge-lane-close.yml already guards against re-triggering on its own bot commits (github-actions[bot] actor check)
acceptance_criteria.detection_guard_built: PASS -- scripts/ci/direct-main-push-guard.ts, with an explicit, honest capability-boundary statement in its own module header and in the incident record
acceptance_criteria.detection_guard_honest_about_limits: PASS -- documented inability to verify GitHub's private audit log or literal admin-bypass-flag usage; documented that 'mentioned in an incident doc' alone is not treated as authorization (requires a structured Emergency-Bypass-Record trailer resolving to a real, matching doc)
acceptance_criteria.repair_path_never_uses_admin_or_direct_p: PASS -- design-invariant test asserts proof-repair.ts never imports node:child_process at all
acceptance_criteria.occurrence_3_incorporated: PASS -- incident record expanded with Occurrence 1 (UTV2-1519, commit 4fe0107551dfc67f09e4c954fa7edb6693d4367f), Occurrence 2 (UTV2-1533, this record's original scope), and Occurrence 3 (UTV2-1542, commit 5c1a3eda68896cd0f1c09ed144f882c7235196a3, push range f4a86c21757570b9eb16ec103bc1397e3a81589f..5c1a3eda68896cd0f1c09ed144f882c7235196a3), with actor/timestamp, explicit statement it occurred while this PR was already open, updated severity (High governance-control risk / Low production impact), and explicit statement the detector's classification logic was correct but had no deployed coverage

acceptance_criteria.prevention_evidence_demonstrates_both_pa: PASS -- verification.md's Prevention evidence section tabulates proof-repair.ts vs lane-close.ts's guard side-by-side: distinct problems solved, both never write to main, both land only via a normal PR, neither leaves push-this-commit ambiguity
